page_header.heading: Everything a Queensland Trade Business Needs to Win Online
page_header.sub: From your first proper website to a full lead generation system — each service is built around one goal: getting your phone ringing with genuine, qualified enquiries.

svc_1.heading: Trade Website Design
svc_1.body_1: Your website is often the first impression a potential customer gets of your business. If it looks outdated, loads slowly, or doesn't clearly explain what you do and where you operate — they'll move on to a competitor within seconds.
svc_1.body_2: Orbit Logic designs custom trade websites that establish trust immediately, communicate your services clearly, and convert visitors into genuine enquiries. Every site is built from scratch — no templates, no shortcuts, no recycled layouts from another industry.
panel_items: Custom design tailored to your trade and brand
Contact forms and lead capture setup
On-page SEO for all key pages
Fast load speed and Core Web Vitals optimisation

svc_2.heading: Website Management
svc_2.body_1: A website isn't a one-time job. It needs ongoing updates, security monitoring, performance maintenance, and regular content changes to stay effective — and most trade business owners simply don't have time for that.
svc_2.body_2: Our management plans handle everything so your site stays fast, secure, and working as hard as the day it launched. You focus on the trade. We'll handle the technology.
panel_items: Uptime monitoring — we know before you do

svc_3.heading: Conversion Landing Pages
svc_3.body_1: Running Google Ads or a local digital campaign? Sending paid traffic to your homepage wastes money. A dedicated conversion landing page is built for one job only: turning a click into an enquiry.
svc_3.body_2: We design focused pages with tight messaging, strong trust signals, and a single call-to-action — so your ad spend actually pays off. Fully compatible with Google Ads, Meta Ads, and any campaign platform.
panel_items: Headline and copy written for your campaign
Fast load speed (critical for Quality Score)

svc_4.heading: Lead Capture & Qualification Systems
svc_4.body_1: Getting website visitors to enquire is one thing. Getting qualified, serious buyers to enquire is another. Our lead capture systems are designed to filter out the tyre-kickers and surface the genuine jobs — before a single word is exchanged.
svc_4.body_2: Smart multi-step forms ask the right questions at the right time, auto-routing leads to your inbox with all the detail you need to respond quickly and confidently.
panel_items: Optional dashboard view of all enquiries

svc_5.heading: Local SEO for Trade Businesses
svc_5.body_1: When a homeowner in your area searches "concreter Brisbane" or "emergency plumber Gold Coast", your business should appear. Local SEO is the process of optimising your website so it ranks for the searches your ideal customers are actually doing — in your service area, for your specific trade.
svc_5.body_2: Orbit Logic builds on-page SEO foundations into every website from day one, and offers ongoing local SEO work for businesses that want to dominate their local search results.
panel_items: Keyword research for your trade and suburb/area
On-page SEO for all key pages
Google Business Profile setup and optimisation
Core Web Vitals and page speed improvements

svc_6.heading: Website Audit & Optimisation
svc_6.body_1: Already have a website but it's not generating leads? Before investing in a full rebuild, let us audit it first. We identify exactly what's costing you enquiries — whether that's slow load speed, poor mobile experience, weak calls-to-action, or thin content — and fix it.
svc_6.body_2: Many sites need targeted optimisation, not a full redesign. We'll be straight with you about which path makes more sense.
panel_items: Core Web Vitals and page speed analysis
Priority fix list with estimated impact

cta_banner.heading: Book a Free Call — We'll Tell You Exactly What You Need
cta_banner.body: Every trade business is at a different stage. In a 30-minute call, we'll assess your current digital presence, identify the highest-impact opportunities, and give you a clear recommendation — no obligation to proceed.
